cardSecurityTerm1.translation: Talabat does not store your card information.

cardSecurityTerm2.translation: Any payment data that you enter is passed to a payment processor via a secure socket layer (SSL) that encrypts all your information.

cardSecurityTerm3.translation: The payment processor tokenizes your information (substituting your sensitive information with a non-sensitive equivalent).

cardSecurityTerm4.translation: The payment processor handles your information with a high industry security standard, as it is PCI compliant.

offerMetaTitle.translation: Best Restaurants Deals in {{country}}: With Talabat Vouchers, Offers, & Discount Codes | Talabat  {{country}}

offerMetaDescription.translation: Enjoy delicious savings with Talabat {{country}}! Dive into our latest vouchers, discount codes, and food offers in {{country}}. Enhance your food journey

offerSeoCopy.translation: Step into a world of culinary savings with Talabat {{country}}. Our platform brings you the tastiest local restaurant deals, sweetened with our exclusive voucher codes. Whether you're craving a quick lunch or planning a gourmet dinner, our Talabat discount codes make it more budget-friendly than ever. We're all about enriching your food adventures while helping you save more. Don't forget to explore our latest Talabat food offers and coupons in {{country}}, designed specifically for our foodie community. Download the Talabat app now and embark on a flavorful journey of irresistible deals!

getAppDescription.translation: Get what you need, when you need it.

websiteMetaDescription.translation: Talabat is the number one online food delivery {{country}}. Find a wide variety of restaurants offering, groceries offering and more.

With an easy-to-use app and unbeatable deals, HungerStation makes every meal more enjoyable. Switch now and discover why it's the perfect choice for your cravings. Start ordering today and experience the difference!
